data.body: Pushed #685 PS3 (8d8e + 2 orchestrator degrade tests) + #686 NEW (ee0b imminent-reformable-fruitbat, trusted gate service+client, incl my held-out integrity oracle). Then close 8d8e (with CI-evidence comment for 'make test green' AC) + close ee0b.
